audience: Minecraft networks that need proxy-level login protection and synced auth state.
summary: Proxy-first authentication for Minecraft networks. Authenticates players at the proxy, syncs login state securely across backend servers, and blocks movement, commands, inventory, and combat until login completes.
supportMethod: GitHub repository issues and ZCraft Studios contact channels.
title: Z-Auth
what: Proxy-first authentication plugin for Minecraft networks.
